title: Speakeasy Workspace
description: A Speakeasy workspace represents a tenant unit within an organization, containing API generation targets, tokens, and settings.

organization_id.description: The organization this workspace belongs to

telemetry_disabled.description: Whether telemetry collection is disabled for this workspace

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the workspace was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the workspace was last updated

verified.description: Whether the workspace has been verified
